inputs.name: study
inputs.description: Accept a fealpy study spec defining parameter sweeps for convergence analysis.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Return study report with trials, best parameters, and convergence analysis.

provides.name: fealpy.study.run
provides.description: Run fealpy parameter sweep studies for convergence testing.

requires.name: fealpy.compile
requires.description: Require script compilation for each trial.

requires.name: fealpy.execute.run
requires.description: Require executor for each trial run.

requires.name: fealpy.validate.report
requires.description: Require validator for each trial validation.
